PERCIVAL: I am an Admin of Team Xen.
Tonight is the night before the \"Grand: Tonight is the night before the "Grand Revival".
I'm not sure whom exactly will come acro: I'm not sure whom exactly will come across this recording of mine, so I shall explain for the lay man.
Team Xen is comprised of the deceased. R: Team Xen is comprised of the deceased. Revitalized, reborn, rejuvenated.
The Grand Revival is the event in which: The Grand Revival is the event in which a mass amount of Team Xen members will be summoned.

And I am here to expose the secrets of T: And I am here to expose the secrets of Team Xen.

Your questions, or rather, the informati: Your questions, or rather, the information I am willing to part with shall be located within these choices.
\\ch[1,8,About Percival, Truth behind Te: \ch[1,8,About Percival, Truth behind Team Xen?, Purpose of this tape?, Your role in Team Xen?, Time Capsules?,Done for now]
PERCIVAL: So, you wish to know more abou: PERCIVAL: So, you wish to know more about me?
My name is Percival. I am 39 years of ag: My name is Percival. I am 39 years of age.
I came to Aevium with my parents to help: I came to Aevium with my parents to help with the recovery efforts after Storm-9 when I was 12.
While my parents and I were in Spotlight: While my parents and I were in Spotlight City, the earth tore itself apart and we fell into it.
Miraculously, my parents and I survived: Miraculously, my parents and I survived the fall, though, we were attacked by what seemed to have been robotic Pokémon.
My mother and father were eaten alive.
I survived for 24 more years, and then I: I survived for 24 more years, and then I... succumbed.
That's all you really need to know about: That's all you really need to know about me! Unfortunately my personal life truly is not very exciting, haha.
PERCIVAL: The truth of Team Xen...
Well, the truth is that Team Xen's \"Gra: Well, the truth is that Team Xen's "Grand Revival" is not its first.
Years prior to it, Madame X revived 65 m: Years prior to it, Madame X revived 65 members in a small broken down room in a broken down facility.
These 65 members were what Madame X call: These 65 members were what Madame X called "The ones with the most potential".
We were the ones that laid siege to Alam: We were the ones that laid siege to Alamissa.
Out of that war, only 16 members survive: Out of that war, only 16 members survived.
Then that number was culled to a measly: Then that number was culled to a measly 9.
There were two particular members of tho: There were two particular members of those 9 that rose above the ranks.
That being me, Percival, and a woman nam: That being me, Percival, and a woman named Cassandra.
We are deemed Team Xen's first set of Ad: We are deemed Team Xen's first set of Admins.
The remaining 7 members have become secr: The remaining 7 members have become secret operatives called Xen Executioners.
The purpose of these Executioners are to: The purpose of these Executioners are to, well, execute members of Team Xen that somehow regain their mortality.
I don't know why this is set in place du: I don't know why this is set in place due to our... circumstances, but it seems that Madame X has some foresight that I do not.
Regardless, our existence is to be kept: Regardless, our existence is to be kept secret from the new members of Team Xen.
Cassandra and I are to slip in with the: Cassandra and I are to slip in with the lowly grunts during the Grand Revival and pretend that we were born among them.
PERCIVAL: The purpose of this tape...
I learned crucial information about Mada: I learned crucial information about Madame X.
Information that has brought me to the c: Information that has brought me to the conclusion that Team Xen does not end with Madame X.
And eventually, this world will be overw: And eventually, this world will be overwritten.
I cannot allow that to happen.
And it deserves to be protected!: And it deserves to be protected!
To think that Madame X would erase such: To think that Madame X would erase such a world away with a snap of a finger?
PERCIVAL: Ahah... I must admit that I on: PERCIVAL: Ahah... I must admit that I only programmed this part for the sake of completion.
Well, you see... I am a talented archite: Well, you see... I am a talented architect.\n The barracks that surround this center were all built and designed by me.
I'm also the one who readied up the Xen: I'm also the one who readied up the Xen HQ. The old design was too bright for our taste.
And this center facility was made to be: And this center facility was made to be my facility and abode when I eventually became an Executive.
I'm quite good with administrative work,: I'm quite good with administrative work, as well. I suppose leaving me with busy work is all I'm good for. Ha ha ha.
PERCIVAL: Oh, so those Time Capsules...
I like to... hide things inside of them: I like to... hide things inside of them and scatter them about.
Parts that shall be preserved forever mo: Parts that shall be preserved forever more.
Some of those capsules have odd... \"Qui: Some of those capsules have odd... "Quirks" as I like to call them.
Mt. Ruin has some interesting properties: Mt. Ruin has some interesting properties. Using these "properties",\c[6] I have been able to send some capsules through time itself.
So if you haven't found any Time Capsule: So if you haven't found any Time Capsules...\nDon't be too sad about it. Ha ha ha...
I'm sure you'll find one... Some time.
PERCIVAL: Now... now that we've gone thr: PERCIVAL: Now... now that we've gone through that.
I told you that this tape is contingency: I told you that this tape is contingency.
And I told you that Team Xen does not en: And I told you that Team Xen does not end with Madame X.
Right after filming this tape, I plan on: Right after filming this tape, I plan on going to Madame X to destroy her.
What happens after...? None can say. Not: What happens after...? None can say. Not even myself.
On the off chance that I am unable to re: On the off chance that I am unable to return without help, or the extremely unlikely scenario that I am defeated...
I want this truth out there.
But to tell you <i>my</i> truth...\\nMad: But to tell you my truth...\nMadame X is strong, but she is not invincible.
And I've studied her. I can overcome her: And I've studied her. I can overcome her.
That is what I plan to do.
If you have found this tape and you are: If you have found this tape and you are wishing to see me...
